title: Welcoming new Developmental Cell advisors.
author_string: Zhang, Hong, Wang, Hongmei, Chen, Lanfen, Gao, Qiang, Jiao, Yuling et al.
abstract: Developmental Cell is evolving as a cross-disciplinary journal and the fields represented by some of our new advisors emphasize this. In this collection of Voices, our board members provide their view on the future directions for their fields, encompassing cell biology in the context of human embryogenesis, cancer, or plants.
